case_title: B SIDE INC. VS. THE BATHTUB MEDIC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-11-2015 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY THE BATHTUB MEDIC
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT THE BATHTUB MEDIC MAILED TO RESPONDENT B SIDE INC.
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF FEB-04-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB.-04-2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ELLIOTT A. MYLES, CLERK JEAN KONG, NOT REPORTED, D525.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT B SIDE INC. TAKE NOTHING FROM APPELLANT THE BATHTUB MEDIC RESPONDENT APPEARED AFTER CASE WAS HEARD AND DISMISSED. DAMAGES UNDER CCP 116.750(C) ARE THEREFORE NOT AWARDED. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF B SIDE INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE BATHTUB MEDIC $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,065.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MINI MINUTES FOR FEB-04-2016 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 525

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF FEB-04-2016 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT REVERSED. THE BATHTUB MEDIC DOES NOT OWE B SIDE, INC. ANY MONEY. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF DEC.-11-2015. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952.

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-04-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearance on Thursday, February 4, 2016 in Department 525:
No Appearance by Respondent/Plaintiff B SIDE INC.
Timothy J. Hannan, Esq.,(707) 578-0903, Specially appearance for Appellant/Defendant THE BATHTUB MEDIC, Owner/Wayne Watkins who is also present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. Wayne Watkins/owner is sworn.
No Appearance by respondent, B side Inc., when the matter is called,
Court informed counsel and Mr. Watkins of THE BATHTUB MEDIC that the matter will be in favor of THE BATHTUB MEDIC.

Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles; Clerk J. Kong; Matter Not Reported.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-11-2015 Judgment Entered
